$comment: All pricing.estimatedValue, recommendedListPrice, and analysis override prices are in AUD (Australian dollars).

sealed.reasoning: UCS flagship approaching retirement with an RRP of $1,200–$1,300 AUD. Secondary market values are at or above retail — hold through retirement for significant post-retirement appreciation. Expected to be one of the most valuable UCS sets once discontinued.
